sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Commodity Classification & Strategic Importance
required_elements: Commodity classification (REE light vs. heavy, PGMs, lithium, cobalt, other critical minerals)
End-market demand composition and growth trajectory
Material intensity trend analysis (next-gen products using more or less per unit)

sections.title: Supply Chain Geopolitics — The Chokepoint Analysis
required_elements: Mining concentration by country (% of raw extraction)
Processing/refining bottleneck mapping and mid-stream concentration
Policy exposure (export controls, strategic stockpile policies, friend-shoring initiatives)
Recycling/secondary supply percentage and economics (primary vs. secondary positioning)

sections.title: Project-Level Economics
required_elements: AISC vs. spot price analysis for mining/processing assets
Capex-to-production timeline and execution status
Permitting and environmental approval status
Jurisdiction risk assessment (resource nationalism, taxation, expropriation history)
Offtake agreement coverage (% of planned production contracted)

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: NAV (net asset value) based on in-situ resource value discounted for extraction economics
EV/Resource per-tonne or per-pound valuation
Commodity-price-scenario DCF analysis
Milestone-based probability-weighted NAV for pre-revenue development-stage companies

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Resource estimate upgrades without feasibility study improvements (promotional risk)
Projects in jurisdictions with recent resource nationalism developments
Supply disruption catalysts (mine closures, export bans, processing facility outages)
Material substitution risks (ferrite magnets replacing NdFeB in EV motors)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Supply chain mapping for primary commodity (mine-to-end-product)
Government stockpile policy analysis
Technology substitution risk assessment

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Commodity classification clearly stated (REE subtype, PGM type, or other critical mineral)
End-market demand composition broken down by application with growth rates
Mining concentration quantified by top 3-5 countries as % of global extraction
Processing/refining concentration mapped with specific identification of bottlenecks
Policy exposure explicitly listed (export controls, sanctions, stockpile policies)
AISC calculated and compared to current spot price with price floor implications
Capex-to-production timeline documented with permitting status
NAV or EV/Resource valuation calculated with commodity price sensitivity
Resource nationalism risk in specific jurisdictions quantified
Investigation tracks include specific supply chain entities, government stockpile policy documents, and substitution technology risks
